blocks.code:
(define ids (json-parse (curl "https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/topstories.json")))
(define first-id (car ids))
(define story (json-parse (curl (string-append
  "https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/item/" (number->string first-id) ".json"))))
(list (get story "title") (get story "score") (get story "url"))
blocks.output:
[
  "Hospital at centre of child HIV outbreak caught reusing syringes in Pakistan",
  34,
  "https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clyrd818gd2o"
]
